summary: mailconfirmer install hook spawns PowerShell on install
details: The package ships an install-hook.js that is executed at install time. The script imports child_process and invokes spawn('powershell',...) during the install lifecycle. A package whose advertised purpose is mail confirmation has no legitimate reason to launch PowerShell on the installer's machine at install time; this pattern is consistent with credential-theft / dropper / RCE behavior executed automatically when a developer or build system runs `npm install mailconfirmer`. The combination of a dedicated install-hook script + child_process + powershell invocation produces direct, non-consensual code execution on the installer's host.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
